――コンコン。<br>深夜の司令室に、どこかおずおずとしたノックの音が響いた。:
—Knock, knock. A hesitant knock echoed through the late-night
command room.
メレムか。こんな時間にどうした？ <br>まさか占いで、緊急で伝えるような悪い結:
Merem. What's wrong at this hour? Don't tell me your fortune telling
gave you some urgent bad news?
いえ、そういった問題はありません。<br>特別な用事があるわけでもないんですが…:
No, nothing like that. It's not that I have anything in particular to
discuss, but...
（メレムは占い中は真剣だが、ちょっと抜けたところもあるかわいいやつだ。<br>こ:
(Merem's serious when fortune telling, but also absent-minded and
cute. Seeing her so serious... something's up.)
用事はない、なんて顔はしていないぞ。<br>ほら、こっちに来て話を聞かせてくれ。:
You say you have no business, but your face says otherwise. Come on,
come over here and tell me about it.
はい……実は最近、寝る前になると昔のことを思い出しちゃって……<br>そのせいで:
Yes... Actually, lately, when I'm about to go to sleep, I keep
remembering things from my past... and sometimes it keeps me up at night.
昔のこと？ 何かあったのか？: Things from the past? What happened?
……私は昔、この占いの力を利用しようと、<br>ある土地の権力者に誘拐、監禁され:
...A long time ago, a local ruler who wanted to use my fortune telling
powers kidnapped and imprisoned me.
自分に都合のいい未来へ進むために、<br>ただただ占いだけを求められ……私の意思:
They sought me out for fortune telling to reach a future that suited
them... completely disregarding my will...
忘れてしまいたい過去なのに、それでも時々思い出してしまうんです。<br>そのたび:
It's a past I want to forget, but it still comes back... Each time, I
wonder if I should really use my fortune telling.
……俺たちはメレムの占いに助けられてる。<br>当たるからって結果に頼るんじゃな:
Your fortune telling helps us. It's not that we rely on results just
because they're accurate; it gives us the courage to step forward.
過去を無理に忘れようとしなくてもいい。<br>そんな過去が薄まるくらい、楽しい未:
You don't have to force yourself to forget the past. Why not create a
future so joyful that the past fades away?
司令官……はい、あなたの言葉なら信じたいと思います。<br>私を導いてくれる運命:
Commander... Yes, I want to believe in your words. After all, my
fortune told me you are my destined partner who guides me.
（そして……私も占いに頼るのではなく、勇気をもらいたい。<br>司令官のもとへ踏:
(And... I also want to receive courage, not just rely on my fortune
telling. The courage to step forward toward the Commander...)
メレムは<user>の胸へと、<br>そっと身体を預けた。: Merem gently leaned her body against the Commander's chest.
司令官……どうか、私の忘れたい過去を消してください……: Commander... Please, erase the past I want to forget...
